title: Passionfroot raises $15M to expand its B2B creator marketplace to the US | TechCrunch
summary: Passionfroot , a German startup building a marketplace connecting B2B creators with brands, said on Wednesday it has raised $15 million in a Series A funding round led by Insight Partners.
